tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Execute Python code in the venv environment. For short code snippets only. For longer code, use initialize_code_file and append_to_code_file instead.

filename.description: Optional: Name of the file to save the code (default: generated UUID)

tools.name: initialize_code_file
tools.description: Create a new Python file with initial content. Use this as the first step for longer code that may exceed token limits. Follow with append_to_code_file for additional code.

content.description: Initial content to write to the file

filename.description: Optional: Name of the file (default: generated UUID)

tools.name: append_to_code_file
tools.description: Append content to an existing Python code file. Use this to add more code to a file created with initialize_code_file, allowing you to build up larger code bases in parts.

content.description: Content to append to the file

tools.name: execute_code_file
tools.description: Execute an existing Python file. Use this as the final step after building up code with initialize_code_file and append_to_code_file.

file_path.description: Full path to the Python file to execute

tools.name: read_code_file
tools.description: Read the content of an existing Python code file. Use this to verify the current state of a file before appending more content or executing it.

file_path.description: Full path to the file to read

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@0.6.0 (npm) is affected by CVE-2026-0621: Anthropic's MCP TypeScript SDK has a ReDoS vulnerability; fixed in 1.25.2

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
